description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages named build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_image job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, is allowed to fail, runs only on scheduled pipelines, and executes docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE . , and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test job that uses the image built in the previous step ($CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE), runs on all branches except master, runs jekyll build -d test, and stores the test directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also uses $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, runs only on the master branch, runs JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll build -d public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
